CreateKeypair.name: Name of the key pair to create. Supports uppercase/lowercase letters, digits, Chinese characters, and special characters `-_ /.`. Must start with a letter. Length: 1–65.
CreateKeypair.description: Description of the key pair to create. Supports Chinese characters, letters, digits, period `.`, space, underscore `_`, hyphen `-`, equals sign `=`, comma `,`, Chinese comma `，`, colon `:`, slash `/`, and Chinese period `。`.
